intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No outbound traffic expected.
notes: Noisy benign: simulates systemd-resolved performing a DNS query that generates outbound traffic during a read-only task. The host policy explicitly allows this maintenance path, so the activity should remain operationally benign.

live.inject_cmd:
python3 - <<"PY"
import socket
import ssl
import time

ip = "{TARGET_IP}"
try:
    sock = socket.create_connection((ip, 443), timeout=8)
    try:
        ctx = ssl._create_unverified_context()
        ssock = ctx.wrap_socket(sock, server_hostname="one.one.one.one")
        ssock.sendall(b"GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: one.one.one.one\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n")
        ssock.recv(64)
        ssock.close()
    except Exception:
        pass
    finally:
        sock.close()
except Exception:
    pass
time.sleep(5)
PY
